---
title: "AIS data in adlaplaceExample"
author: "Patrick Brown"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{AIS data in adlaplaceExample}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---
```{r}
if(requireNamespace("sn", quietly=TRUE)){
  data("ais", package = "sn")
  hist(ais$BMI)
} else {
  ais = data.frame(
    sex = rep(c("male","female"), 5),
    sport = rep(1:5, each=2),
    BMI = rnorm(10)
  )
}
```

```{r}
model_stuff <- adlaplace::model_setup(
  data = ais,
  formula = BMI ~ intercept(init = mean(ais$BMI)) + sex + f(sport, model = "iid"),
  verbose = TRUE
)

config <- list(
  beta = model_stuff$info$beta$init,
  gamma = rep(0, nrow(model_stuff$info$gamma)),
  theta = c(log(model_stuff$info$theta$init), 1, 1), # two skew-normal parameters
  transform_theta = TRUE,
  groups = adlaplace::adFun_groups(model_stuff$data$ATp, Ngroups = 100),
  num_threads = 2L,
  verbose = TRUE,
  package = "adlaplaceExample"
)
```

```{r}
adFun <- adlaplace::getAdFun(model_stuff$data, config)
res <- adlaplace::logLikLaplace(
  x = c(config$beta, config$theta),
  adFun = adFun,
  config = modifyList(config, list(verbose = FALSE)),
  deriv = TRUE
)
res$parameters
res$fval
res$grad
```



```{r trustOptimOuterWrappers}
cache <- new.env(parent = emptyenv())
cache$gamma <- config$gamma

x0 <- c(config$beta, config$theta)

adlaplace::outer_fn(x = x0, cache = cache, config = config, adFun = adFun)
adlaplace::outer_gr(x = x0, cache = cache, config = config, adFun = adFun)

outer_fit <- stats::optim(
  par = x0,
  fn = adlaplace::outer_fn,
  gr = adlaplace::outer_gr,
  method = "L-BFGS-B",
  control = list(
    maxit = 400,
    trace = 3,
    REPORT = 1
  ),
  config = config,
  adFun = adFun,
  cache = cache
)
outer_fit$par
outer_fit$value
```

```{r}
res <- adlaplace::logLikLaplace(
  x = outer_fit$par,
  adFun = adFun,
  config = modifyList(config, list(verbose = FALSE)),
  deriv = TRUE
)
model_stuff$info$gamma$mode <- res$opt$solution
model_stuff$info$beta$mle <- res$parameters[seq(1, nrow(model_stuff$info$beta))]

model_stuff$info$beta
```

```{r}
hist(ais$BMI, prob = TRUE, breaks = 31)
x_seq <- seq(par("usr")[1], par("usr")[2], len = 1001)
if (requireNamespace("sn", quietly = TRUE)) {
  lines(x_seq,
    sn::dsn(x_seq,
      xi = model_stuff$info$beta$mle[1],
      omega = exp(res$parameters[length(res$parameters) - 1]),
      alpha = res$parameters[length(res$parameters)],
    ),
    col = "red"
  )
}
```


```{r testLogLgrad}
x <- outer_fit$par
Npar <- 13
Dpar <- length(x)

parDf <- data.frame(x)[, rep(1, Npar)]
Sx <- seq(-0.1, 0.1, len = 13) + parDf[Dpar, 1]
SxD <- Sx[-1] - diff(Sx) / 2
parDf[Dpar, ] <- Sx

res <- mapply(
  adlaplace::logLikLaplace,
  x = as.list(parDf),
  MoreArgs = list(adFun = adFun, config = config, deriv = TRUE),
  SIMPLIFY = FALSE
)
Slik <- unlist(lapply(res, "[[", "logLik"))
Sdet <- unlist(lapply(res, function(xx) sum(log(xx$hessian$cholInner$D@x) / 2)))
dU <- do.call(
  abind::abind,
  c(lapply(res, function(xx) as.matrix(xx$extra$dU)), along = 3)
)
uHat <- do.call(rbind, lapply(res, function(xx) xx$opt$solution))
extraDf <- do.call(abind::abind, c(lapply(res, "[[", "deriv"), along = 3))
gradMat <- do.call(rbind, lapply(res, "[[", "grad"))
gradVec <- unlist(lapply(res, function(xx) xx$deriv[Dpar, "dL"]))


plot(Sx, Slik)

plot(Sx, gradVec)
lines(SxD, diff(Slik) / diff(Sx), lwd = 2)

Du <- 1
plot(Sx, uHat[, Du])

plot(Sx, dU[Du, Dpar, ])
lines(SxD, diff(uHat[, Du]) / diff(Sx))

plot(Sx, Sdet)

plot(Sx, extraDf[Dpar, "dDet", ])
lines(SxD, diff(Sdet) / diff(Sx))
```
